title: Gol de Ndiaye (5-0) en el Senegal 5-0 Irak
summary: Recibió en zona de tres cuartos, enfiló hacia el área y remató desde la frontal. La pelota entró ajustada al palo.

title: Gol de Gueye (4-0) en el Senegal 5-0 Irak
Gol de Gueye (3-0) en el Senegal 5-0 Irak
summary: Volvió a recuperar Senegal cerca del área de Irak y la pelota le llegó a Pape Gueye que la puso con mucha clase al palo largo desde la frontal. Qué golpeo más bonito.

title: Genoa, accordo verbale col Thun per Meichtry: De Rossi attende il suo nuovo centrocampista
excerpt: Il Genoa è vicino a chiudere un acquisto in mediana.
summary: Il Genoa è vicino a chiudere un acquisto in mediana. Come riporta Sky Sport, il club rossoblù ha raggiunto infatti un accordo verbale con il Thun per l'arrivo di Franz-Ethan Meichtry, centrocampista svizzero classe 2005. Restano da definire solo gli ultimi dettagli formali prima della chiusura dell'operazione. Per il giovane talento, cresciuto e affermatosi in patria con la maglia del Thun, si profila così il primo trasferimento all'estero. Il Genoa avrebbe superato la concorrenza di alcune neopromosse della Premier League, assicurandosi uno dei profili più interessanti del calcio svizzero. Una volta completato l'iter burocratico, Meichtry sarà a disposizione della squadra guidata da Daniele De Rossi.

title: Berti e la Nazionale: "Dieci giorni indimenticabili. Vestire l'Azzurro è il sogno più grande"
excerpt: Nel corso dell'intervista rilasciata ai canali ufficiali della Cremonese dopo il suo arrivo dal Cesena, il centrocampista Tommaso Berti ha parlato anche della sua recente esperienza con la Nazionale maggiore nelle amichevoli contro Lussemburgo e Grecia...
summary: Nel corso dell'intervista rilasciata ai canali ufficiali della Cremonese dopo il suo arrivo dal Cesena, il centrocampista Tommaso Berti ha parlato anche della sua recente esperienza con la Nazionale maggiore nelle amichevoli contro Lussemburgo e Grecia in cui sulla panchina si è seduto il tecnico dell'Under 21 Silvio Baldini. Queste le sue parole: Lo scorso giugno hai ricevuto la chiamata della Nazionale maggiore. Cosa si prova in quei momenti? “Le prime persone che ho chiamato sono stati i miei genitori. Ho vissuto dieci giorni indimenticabili con emozioni grandissime e incredibili, perché penso che giocare per l’Italia sia il sogno più grande di qualsiasi giocatore italiano. In più abbiamo vinto due partite e ho avuto la fortuna di allenarmi con campioni come Donnarumma e Pio Esposito, oltre a tanti compagni fortissimi”. Con l’Italia Under 21 hai avuto modo di allenarti al Centro Sportivo “Giovanni Arvedi” e vivere una partita allo Zini. Che esperienza è stata? “Il centro mi ha fatto veramente una bella impressione e ci ha portato bene, perché abbiamo vinto contro l’Armenia. Non vedo l’ora di tornare ad allenarmi lì”.

title: Mondiale 2026, classifica marcatori aggiornata: Messi in vetta, quattro big alle sue spalle
excerpt: Continuano ad arrivare gol a pioggia al Mondiale 2026.
summary: 4 gol: Kylian Mbappe (Francia), Erling Haaland (Norvegia), Vinicius Jr (Brasile), Ousmane Dembélé (Francia). 3 gol: Deniz Undav (Germania), Jonathan David (Canada), Johan Manzambi (Svizzera), Ismael Saibari (Marocco), Matheus Cunha (Brasile), Brian Brobbey (Olanda), Ismaila Sarr (Senegal). 2 gol: Mikel Oyarzabal (Spagna), Yasin Ayari (Svezia), Anthony Elanga (Svezia), Cody Gakpo (Olanda), Crysencio Summerville (Olanda), Folarin Balogun (Stati Uniti), Cyle Larin (Canada), Maximiliano Araujo (Uruguay), Daichi Kamada (Giappone), Ayase Ueda (Giappone), Elijah Just (Nuova Zelanda), Harry Kane (Inghilterra), Kai Havertz (Germania), Daniel Munoz (Colombia), Cristiano Ronaldo (Portogallo), Ruben Vargas (Svizzera), Ermin Mahmic (Bosnia ed Erzegovina), Julian Quinones (Messico), Nicolas Pepe (Costa d'Avorio), Pape Gueye (Senegal).

title: Ora l'Inter infastidisce il Napoli: inserimento nella trattativa per Khalaili sulla destra
excerpt: Sfumato Marco Palestra, l’Inter valuta alternative sulla fascia destra e potrebbe dare fastidio al Napoli.
summary: Sfumato Marco Palestra, l’Inter valuta alternative sulla fascia destra e potrebbe dare fastidio al Napoli. Secondo quanto riferito da Sky Sport, il club nerazzurro sarebbe infatti pronto a muoversi per Anan Khalaili, laterale dell’Union Saint-Gilloise da tempo nel mirino del club partenopeo. Il Napoli, per ora, non ha ancora raggiunto un accordo con il club belga, che valuta l’esterno israeliano classe 2004 attorno ai 25 milioni di euro. Da capire se l’arrivo dell’Inter possa cambiare le carte in tavola. I nerazzurri hanno necessità di un colpo in quel settore del campo, visto il trasferimento - non ancora ufficiale - di Denzel Dumfries al Real Madrid. Le alternative restano varie, da Cambiaso a Dodo, passando per Ndoye e Norton-Cuffy.

title: Claudio Terzi lascia la Primavera dello Spezia e va in Serie D: allenerà il Ligorna
excerpt: L'esperienza di Claudio Terzi alla guida della Primavera dello Spezia, club  in cui ha militato e di cui è stato capitano, è terminata con l'allenatore che dalla prossima stagione sarà alla guida di una prima squadra in Serie D.
summary: L'esperienza di Claudio Terzi alla guida della Primavera dello Spezia, club in cui ha militato e di cui è stato capitano, è terminata con l'allenatore che dalla prossima stagione sarà alla guida di una prima squadra in Serie D. L'ex del Bologna infatti si siederà sulla panchina del Ligorna come comunicato dalla società ligure in una nota ufficiale: "La Società SCD Ligorna 1922 è lieta di comunicare di aver affidato la guida tecnica della Prima Squadra a Claudio Terzi nella stagione 2026/27 . ⠀ Classe 1984, Terzi approda al Ligorna dopo l'esperienza maturata nel Settore Giovanile dello Spezia, dove nelle ultime due stagioni ha guidato prima l'Under 17 e successivamente la formazione Primavera, nelle ultime due stagioni. In precedenza aveva fatto parte dello staff tecnico della prima squadra bianconera, vivendo da vicino il calcio professionistico anche nella nuova veste di allenatore. ⠀ Da calciatore, Claudio Terzi vanta una carriera di altissimo profilo con oltre vent'anni di attività tra Serie A, Serie B e Serie C, avendo collezionato più di 550 presenze. Cresciuto nel Bologna, ha vestito anche le maglie di Napoli, Siena, Palermo e soprattutto Spezia, club di cui è stato capitano e simbolo, conquistando la storica promozione in Serie A del 2020. ⠀ A Mister Terzi il più caloroso benvenuto da parte di tutta la famiglia biancazzurra e i migliori auguri di buon lavoro per questa nuova avventura sulla panchina del Ligorna".

title: Lazio fans protest and Lotito completes purchase of new club
excerpt: Lazio fans have announced a mass protest on July 2 and they were further angered...
summary: Lazio fans have announced a mass protest on July 2 and they were further angered when it was announced President Claudio Lotito had bought another club, Reggina. The ultras have been boycotting the home matches for months at the Stadio Olimpico, leaving the stands painfully deserted during even the biggest games of the season in Serie A. They only suspended their protest for a couple of exceptions, most notably the Coppa Italia Final defeat to Inter.

title: Norton-Cuffy attractive to Juventus, Napoli and Fiorentina
excerpt: Genoa full-back Brooke Norton-Cuffy is set to spark a bidding war, with reports Juventus, Napoli...
summary: Genoa full-back Brooke Norton-Cuffy is set to spark a bidding war, with reports Juventus, Napoli and Fiorentina have all asked about the ex-Arsenal talent. The 22-year-old had a very impressive two years at Marassi since the transfer from the Gunners for €2m plus add-ons and a percentage of the sell-on fee. A product of the Arsenal academy, his value has soared thanks to regular performances for the Grifone, both as a right-back and in a more advanced role in a five-man midfield.

title: Jorge Mendes mastermind of Milan transfers, after Goncalo Ramos, targeted Casadó
excerpt: Jorge Mendes is emerging as the key behind the new Milan transfer strategy, as after...
summary: Jorge Mendes is emerging as the key behind the new Milan transfer strategy, as after a €70m deal for PSG striker Goncalo Ramos, he’s working to bring in Marc Casadó from Barcelona. It is hardly new that agent Mendes has very strong links with the Rossoneri, as he already helped engineer moves for Pervis Estupinan, Joao Felix, Andre Silva and of course coach Sergio Conceicao, amongst others. Now that Milan have scrapped the roles of technical director and director of sport for a more streamlined club structure, coach Ruben Amorim is given more power, and that also means consulting with Mendes.

title: Legendary Vieira: ‘Koné is the best midfielder in France today’
excerpt: Arsenal legend and former Genoa coach Patrick Vieira declared that Roma’s Manu Koné is ‘for...
summary: Arsenal legend and former Genoa coach Patrick Vieira declared that Roma’s Manu Koné is ‘for me today the best midfielder in France.’ Les Bleus complete the group stage of the World Cup this evening against Norway at 20.00 UK time (21.00 CEST). He has 16 senior caps for France, but was left on the bench for the opening World Cup game against Senegal, then started the next two with Iraq and Norway.

title: Report Davinson Sanchez and Galatasaray in talks for Como move
excerpt: Como are in negotiations with Galatasaray for Colombia international Davinson Sanchez, claim reports, with an...
summary: Como are in negotiations with Galatasaray for Colombia international Davinson Sanchez, claim reports, with an asking price of €15m for the former Tottenham defender. According to Belgian transfer expert Sacha Tavolieri, the talks are in full swing and the player is open to a Serie A switch to work with coach Cesc Fabregas. It’s the second year in a row that Como have been linked with a move for the player.

title: Brilliant Dembele hat-trick helps France see off Norway to top group
excerpt: Ousmane Dembele's first-half hat-trick helps France soundly defeat a Norway side without Erling Haaland 4-1 to top Group I at the World Cup.
summary: Ousmane Dembele's first-half hat-trick helps France soundly defeat a Norway side without Erling Haaland 4-1 to top Group I at the World Cup.

title: What each team need to reach World Cup knockouts
excerpt: With the final round of group fixtures nearing a conclusion the path to the World Cup final on 19 July is starting to take shape.
summary: Spain will progress if they avoid defeat against Uruguay in their final group game The final round of group fixtures is nearing a conclusion, with the path to the World Cup final on 19 July becoming clearer. But with 32 of the 48 teams advancing to the knockout rounds, new tie-breaker rules, and a table of third-placed teams to keep track of, staying across the various permutations is far from simple.

title: Dembélé hat-trick fires France past Norway to seal top spot in World Cup group
excerpt: Does anyone at the World Cup have the defensive strength to deny this hyper-mobile, supremely varied French attack? Not, it turns out, a second-string Norway, who were torn apart in the first half in Boston, as Ousmane Dembélé scored a beautifully precise 25-minute hat-trick en route to a 4-1 win
summary: Does anyone at the World Cup have the defensive strength to deny this hyper-mobile, supremely varied French attack? Not, it turns out, a second-string Norway, who were torn apart in the first half in Boston, as Ousmane Dembélé scored a beautifully precise 25-minute hat-trick en route to a 4-1 win. France now top Group I and will play their last-32 tie in New Jersey next Tuesday. Norway will play Côte d’Ivoire in Texas. This was a fun, freewheeling game, with the feel of a tournament formality, big third-place playoff energy. But it wasn’t quite that. Certainly nothing that happened here in the absence of the rested Erling Haaland will help nourish Norway’s late-stage tournament hopes, which are real but tentative, and which can only have been damaged by the sight of France’s attack using the corners of Egil Selvik’s goal for shooting practice in a jarringly open, defensively chaotic first half. This game had been billed in the World Cup hype-o-drome as Mbappé v Haaland, Nordic Goal-Grendel versus Parisian Attack-Guillotine, and so on. In the event, it was something else as Haaland was rested along with nine other Norwegians, plus any notions of continuity, momentum or coherent defence.

title: Senegal salvage hopes of a place in World Cup last 32 with thrashing of Iraq
excerpt:
Substitute Pape Gueye scored a pair of sensational second-half goals from long range, and Senegal got a much-needed boost to their goal differencewith a 5-0 victory over 10-man Iraq in their Group I finale on Friday.

Ismaïla Sarr added his third ⁠goal of the tournament, ⁠the first ​of four
summary: Substitute Pape Gueye scored a pair of sensational second-half goals from long range, and Senegal got a much-needed boost to their goal difference with a 5-0 victory over 10-man Iraq in their Group I finale on Friday. Ismaïla Sarr added his third ⁠goal of the tournament, ⁠the first ​of four after half-time for the Lions of Teranga, who sealed a third-place group finish and are vying for one ⁠of the eight third-place spots in the last 32. They currently hold the fifth-best record of third-place sides based on their plus-2 goal difference, but ⁠four of the teams beneath them have yet to play their final group matches.

excerpt:
• Tuchel now left with limited regular full-back options

  • Chelsea defender sustained hamstring setback in March

Reece James will miss England’s next two World Cup matches at least as he fights to recover from a hamstring injury. The right-back, who has a histor
summary: Tuchel now left with limited regular full-back options Chelsea defender sustained hamstring setback in March Reece James will miss England’s next two World Cup matches at least as he fights to recover from a hamstring injury. The right-back, who has a history of hamstring problems, reported tightness after the team’s 0-0 draw against Ghana in Boston on Tuesday.

• Pochettino has been in charge of the US since late 2024

  • Former Spurs and PSG boss likely to have club interest

Mauricio Pochettino has been offered a contract extension that would keep him in charge of the US men’s national team through the 2030 World Cup, m
summary: Pochettino has been in charge of the US since late 2024 Former Spurs and PSG boss likely to have club interest Mauricio Pochettino has been offered a contract extension that would keep him in charge of the US men’s national team through the 2030 World Cup, multiple sources familiar with the offer said on Friday. Sources spoke with the Guardian on condition of anonymity because they were not authorized to speak on the matter.

title: Algeria eye revenge in first match against Austria since ‘shame of Gijón’
excerpt:
Group J game recalls the 1982 World Cup, when Austria and West Germany played out a mutually beneficial result

How long do football grudges last? It has long been argued that Brazil never truly recovered from
summary: Group J game recalls the 1982 World Cup, when Austria and West Germany played out a mutually beneficial result How long do football grudges last? It has long been argued that Brazil never truly recovered from the Maracanazo, or, if they did, it took decades. The same might be said of the English football community and Diego’ Maradona’s “Hand of God”. In Algeria, the national wound was inflicted at the 1982 World Cup and has been universally referred to as “the Shame of Gijón”. Almost exactly 44 years later, a potential reckoning for that arrives when Algeria play Austria in their final group match, with a last-32 place on the line. In the summer of 1982 Algeria was a young nation, two decades removed from 132 years of colonial rule. Unless one was versed in African independence movements or the doctrine of third-worldism, Algeria was unlikely to register in most people’s political thinking. The World Cup, held in Spain, was a rare and precious platform for the country to announce itself, and the team seized the opportunity.

title: Connor shines as leaders Leeds produce statement victory against Hull KR
excerpt: Leeds strengthened their position at the Betfred Super League summit after delivering another crushing win over defending champions Hull KR at Headingley.
summary: Leeds strengthened their position at the Betfred Super League summit after delivering another crushing win over defending champions Hull KR at Headingley. Eight days after slaying fellow title rivals Warrington by a similar margin, Brad Arthur's men turned on the style to sink the Robins 34-8 as Jake Connor helped himself to an 18-point individual haul. Coupled with another brace from Maika Sivo, it added up to an emphatic statement of intent from the hosts who doled out more misery on their opponents after their 58-6 demolition during their last meeting in Las Vegas in February.

title: Scheffler misses out on another sub-60 round for early Travelers target
excerpt: Scottie Scheffler failed to convert a 25-foot birdie putt on the 18th hole at the Travelers Championship, narrowly missing out on a chance to join Jim Furyk as the only players in PGA Tour history with two sub-60 rounds.
summary: Scottie Scheffler sets an early target atop the scoreboard at Travelers Championship as he misses out on a second sub-60 round; "It would be cool to shoot 59, but somebody has already shot 58 here, so it's not even the course record" Scottie Scheffler failed to convert a 25-foot birdie putt on the 18th hole at the Travelers Championship, narrowly missing out on a chance to join Jim Furyk as the only players in PGA Tour history with two sub-60 rounds. Scheffler had to settle for a 10-under 60 on the soft TPC River Highlands course, setting an early target atop the scoreboard on a day of extreme low scoring at the final signature event of the regular season.

title: Golden Boot race: Dembele joins Mbappe in Messi chase after hat-trick
excerpt: Lionel Messi, Kylian Mbappe, Erling Haaland, Vinicius Junior and now Ousmane Dembele are involved in what is shaping up to be one of the most hotly contested World Cup Golden Boot battles in memory.
summary: Ousmane Dembele joins goalscoring pack chasing Lionel Messi in race for World Cup Golden Boot after hat-trick vs Norway; Cristiano Ronaldo finally off mark, Harry Kane in mix; Just Fontaine's 1958 record of 13 goals in a single tournament is in sight Lionel Messi, Kylian Mbappe, Erling Haaland, Vinicius Junior and now Ousmane Dembele are involved in what is shaping up to be one of the most hotly contested World Cup Golden Boot battles in memory. The superstars are delivering on the biggest stage of them all and are setting a blistering pace in the race to be the 2026 tournament's top goalscorer.

title: Dembele's first-half hat-trick sees France beat Norway's reserves
excerpt: Ousmane Dembele's 25-minute hat-trick allowed France to comfortably beat Norway's second string 4-1 and  complete a perfect Group I campaign.
summary: Match report as France top Group I with a 4-1 win over Norway, who made 10 changes and left Erling Haaland and Martin Odegaard as unused substitutes; Ousmane Dembele scored a treble inside 32 minutes in Boston; Thelo Aasgaard pulled one back and Jorgen Strand Larsen's penalty was saved Ousmane Dembele's 25-minute hat-trick allowed France to comfortably beat Norway's second string 4-1 and complete a perfect Group I campaign. With qualification already secured for both sides, and only top spot to play for, Norway made 10 changes - leaving Erling Haaland and Martin Odegaard on the bench - and it showed.

title: Ecuador ganó a Alemania y al VAR
excerpt: Al otro lado del espejo
summary: Ecuador celebra su victoria sobre Alemania, todo un hito en la historia futbolística del país, y no es para menos, porque ganar a los alemanes en una Copa del Mundo es cosa al alcance de muy pocos y hacerlo remontando, de menos. Esa felicidad quizás entierre la afrenta que supuso el gol alemán que abrió el marcador, concedido por la árbitra norteamericana Tori Penso con la complicidad del VAR, al que atendía (?) el estadounidense Joe Dickinson.

title: Senegal 5-0 Irak | Resumen Mundial 2026
summary: Las opciones de Senegal para meterse en dieciseisavos del Mundial como uno de los ocho mejores terceros pasaban por ganar... y golear para equilibrar su 'goal average'. Cumplieron con su cometido 'aplastando' a una humilde Irak —primera selección africana que marca cinco goles en un Mundial— con una actuación autoritaria en la segunda mitad que les deja con pie y medio en la siguiente ronda.

title: Albinoleffe, Stanzani è bluceleste: ha firmato un annuale con opzione fino al 2028
excerpt: Dopo l'addio al Carpi, l'attaccante Leonardo Stanzani ha firmato un contratto con l'AlbinoLeffe a cui si legerà per un anno con opzione.
summary: Dopo l'addio al Carpi, l'attaccante Leonardo Stanzani ha firmato un contratto con l'AlbinoLeffe a cui si legerà per un anno con opzione. questo il comunicato del club e le parole del giocatore: "U.C. AlbinoLeffe comunica di aver acquisito, a partire dal 1 luglio 2026, le prestazioni sportive del calciatore Leonardo Stanzani - attaccante classe 2000 - sino al 30 giugno 2027, con opzione di rinnovo automatico al verificarsi di determinate condizioni fino al 2028. Nativo di Bologna, il giocatore ha collezionato - nella stagione appena terminata - un totale di 35 presenze, mettendo a referto 3 gol e 3 assist, con la maglia del Carpi (Serie C - Girone B).

title: Flop nei primi mesi, Ratkov punta a rilanciarsi. La Lazio gli darà una seconda chance
excerpt: Grande flop del mercato di gennaio, Petar Ratkov punta a riscattarsi con la maglia della Lazio.
summary: Grande flop del mercato di gennaio, Petar Ratkov punta a riscattarsi con la maglia della Lazio. Acquistato dal Salisburgo per 13 milioni, i primi mesi in biancoceleste sono stati difficoltosi: 8 presenze e zero reti. Sarri lo aveva ha schierato nei primi due mesi, poi si è arreso. Anche i numeri sono stati impietosi: la media voto di Tuttomercatoweb è di 5.33 che fa di lui il peggior acquisto dell'ultima sessione invernale di mercato. Cosa fare, dunque? A Formello sono sicuri e secondo quanto riporta lalaziosiamonoi il serbo avrà la sua seconda chance. Rino Gattuso avrà modo di valutarlo in ritiro. Circa eventuali acquirenti, in queste settimane era emerso l'interesse di alcuni club tedeschi. 22 anni, Ratkov ha firmato un contratto con la Lazio fino a giugno 2030.

title: Il CT della Costa d'Avorio contro Schweinsteiger: "Vuole tornare al centro dell'attenzione"
excerpt: La qualificazione della Costa d'Avorio ai sedicesimi di finale del Mondiale 2026 è stata accompagnata da una dura polemica che ha coinvolto il commissario tecnico Emerse Faé e l'ex campione del mondo tedesco Bastian Schweinsteiger.
summary: La qualificazione della Costa d'Avorio ai sedicesimi di finale del Mondiale 2026 è stata accompagnata da una dura polemica che ha coinvolto il commissario tecnico Emerse Faé e l'ex campione del mondo tedesco Bastian Schweinsteiger. L'ex centrocampista della Germania, durante una trasmissione televisiva, aveva commentato lo stile di gioco degli ivoriani definendolo "un calcio molto africano, poco ortodosso e un po' selvaggio". Parole che hanno suscitato numerose critiche e alle quali Faé ha risposto con fermezza. "Mi sento deluso. È strano che parli in questo modo", ha dichiarato il ct della Costa d'Avorio, lanciando poi una frecciata all'ex Bayern Monaco: "Dimostreremo che l'Africa non è soltanto fisicità, ma anche tecnica e tattica".

title: Conti non in ordine, Marsiglia e Lione sanzionati: tetto agli stipendi per entrambi i club
excerpt: La DNCG (Direzione Nazionale per il Controllo della Gestione) ha sciolto le riserve sulla posizione finanziaria di Marsiglia e Lione, definendo le misure che accompagneranno i due club in vista della prossima stagione.
summary: La DNCG (Direzione Nazionale per il Controllo della Gestione) ha sciolto le riserve sulla posizione finanziaria di Marsiglia e Lione, definendo le misure che accompagneranno i due club in vista della prossima stagione. Dopo settimane di confronti con l'organismo di controllo del calcio francese, entrambe le società dovranno fare i conti con limitazioni sul fronte economico. Per il Marsiglia, inizialmente in attesa di ulteriori verifiche, è stato imposto un tetto al monte ingaggi e alle spese per i trasferimenti. La società aveva presentato un piano di risanamento basato sulla cessione di alcuni giocatori e sulla riduzione dei costi. Decisivo anche l'intervento dell'azionista Frank McCourt, che ha fornito le garanzie economiche richieste dalla DNCG per coprire il deficit. Situazione diversa, ma con un esito simile, per il Lione. Dopo il recente passaggio di proprietà a Michele Kang, il club vedrà il proprio monte stipendi vincolato al budget previsto per l'acquisizione. L'imprenditrice americana, diventata azionista di maggioranza dopo l'accordo per rilevare l'87,7% di Eagle Football Group, ha illustrato il proprio progetto all'organismo di controllo.

title: Cremonese, colpo Berti per il centrocampo: arriva a titolo definitivo dal Cesena
excerpt: La Cremonese ha piazzato un importante colpo in mezzo al campo acquistando dal Cesena il centrocampista classe 2004 Berti.
summary: La Cremonese ha piazzato un importante colpo in mezzo al campo acquistando dal Cesena il centrocampista classe 2004 Berti. Per il calciatore si tratta della seconda esperienza lontano dalla sua città natale dopo quella alla Fiorentina Primavera. Questo il comunicato dei grigiorossi: "U.S. Cremonese comunica di aver acquisito a titolo definitivo dalla società Cesena FC i diritti alle prestazioni sportive di Tommaso Berti. Centrocampista di grande qualità e dinamismo, il classe 2004 vanta già una lunga esperienza tra i Professionisti grazie alle 139 partite giocate in maglia Cesena, squadra nella quale è cresciuto a livello giovanile per poi esordire in Serie C a soli 17 anni. Dopo aver vinto il campionato con i bianconeri nel 2023/24 è stato protagonista nelle ultime due stagioni di Serie B registrando 11 assist e 6 gol in 67 presenze, mettendosi in mostra come uno dei migliori giovani della categoria. Oltre ad aver esordito con l’Italia Under 21 nelle gare di qualificazione agli Europei, lo scorso giugno è stato convocato dalla Nazionale maggiore per le sfide amichevoli con Grecia e Lussemburgo. Benvenuto in grigiorosso, Tommaso". Questo il comunicato del club romagnolo: "Cesena FC comunica di aver ceduto a titolo definitivo all'US Cremonese il diritto alle prestazioni sportive del centrocampista Tommaso Berti.

title: Report Goncalo Ramos to Milan done for record €55m fee including add-ons
excerpt: The Athletic claim that Milan have agreed a club record fee with Paris Saint-Germain for...
summary: The Athletic claim that Milan have agreed a club record fee with Paris Saint-Germain for Goncalo Ramos at €55m including add-ons, and that he underwent his medical on World Cup duty with Portugal. There had already been reports in A Bola and L’Equipe today that the first offer had been made by the Rossoneri for the striker, who was specifically requested by new coach Ruben Amorim. They noted that it was around €40m and still below the asking price of €50m plus add-ons.

title: Tonali bidding war imminent as Arsenal fight Tottenham for Italy star
excerpt: After reports Sandro Tonali agreed personal terms with Tottenham, now Arsenal are ready to step...
summary: After reports Sandro Tonali agreed personal terms with Tottenham, now Arsenal are ready to step up talks with Newcastle United for the Italy international, whose asking price is well over €100m. The former Brescia and Milan midfielder is one of the most sought-after players on the transfer market this summer, as he seems to believe that his time with the Magpies has come to a natural conclusion. It has been said over the last few weeks that both Tottenham and Arsenal are eager to snap him up, but that the Gunners would be his preferred option.

title: Impressive Koné boosts France profile and Arsenal interest for Roma
excerpt: With reports of Arsenal interest, Roma midfielder Manu Koné is increasing his transfer value with...
summary: With reports of Arsenal interest, Roma midfielder Manu Koné is increasing his transfer value with France at the World Cup, breaking into the starting XI. The 25-year-old had already been the subject of a strong push on the market from Inter, both last summer and again in January, but the Giallorossi held firm. Now his value is set to sky-rocket above the current €50m, because reports in France note that he has really impressed for Les Bleus at the 2026 World Cup.

title: Torino warning Simeone won’t be sold to River Plate
excerpt: Giovanni Simeone would gladly go to River Plate, claim reports in Argentina, but Torino informed...
summary: Giovanni Simeone would gladly go to River Plate, claim reports in Argentina, but Torino informed the striker today that he is not for sale. The centre-forward turns 31 next month and has been away from his homeland since first leaving River Plate for Genoa in 2016. His career has been almost entirely in Italy, also representing Fiorentina, Cagliari, Hellas Verona and Napoli, coming to Torino last summer.

title: Palestra finalising Chelsea transfer today with medical, cost set at €60m
excerpt: Italy international Marco Palestra is having his Chelsea medical today, with Atalanta reportedly pocketing €57m...
summary: Italy international Marco Palestra is having his Chelsea medical today, with Atalanta reportedly pocketing €57m plus €3m in add-ons and a 10 per cent cut of the future sale fee. The right-back flew out to London yesterday and his representatives are finalising the details of the contract now. The Premier League side blew Inter away in negotiations by offering double the €2.5m per season salary proposal, so he will earn €5m per season net at Stamford Bridge in a six-year plus option for one more season contract.

title: Rice back in England training but James misses out again
excerpt: Declan Rice returns to England training on Friday, but Reece James again misses out and remains a doubt to face Panama.
summary: Declan Rice missed England training on Thursday but returned on Friday Declan Rice returned to England training on Friday but Reece James missed the session as doubt remains about his availability for the Three Lions' final group game against Panama. Chelsea defender James has a hamstring issue which he picked up in England's 0-0 draw with Ghana on Tuesday and was missing from the group training session before the squad fly to New York.

title: Why has Trump stayed away from the World Cup?
excerpt: Why has Donald Trump stayed away from the World Cup? And will he appear before the final?
summary: Donald Trump attended the World Cup draw in December United States President Donald Trump was expected by many to regularly feature at the World Cup. But he is yet to attend a single match, despite the United States team winning two of their three group games and qualifying for the knockout stages.

title: Is an outsider right about reasons for Scottish football's ills?
excerpt: From undervalued broadcasting deals to unfulfilled potential, Ian Wright says he feels sorry for Scottish football fans - but is the former England striker right?
summary: Ian Wright (right) said he felt sorry for Scotland fans following years of unfulfilled potential As forensics prepare to start a post-mortem into another botched attempt by Scotland to progress from the group stage at a major finals, has a former England striker managed to hit the nail on the head regarding the reasons for Scottish football's ills? Rather than pointing the finger at PlayStations, 'no ball games' signage or rising pitch hire costs, Ian Wright called for a "bolder, braver vision" and suggested "somebody is letting down Scotland on a massive scale".

title: Rainbow flags await Egypt and Iran at awkward Pride Match
excerpt: Iran's coach refuses to discuss pride celebrations in Seattle, where his country face Egypt in a crucial Group G match.
summary: Rainbow flags - a symbol of LGBTQ+ pride, diversity, and social inclusion - will be flown inside the Seattle Stadium Iran's head coach Amir Ghalenoei says he will not address "things that do not exist" as his team prepare to play Egypt in the Pride Match in Seattle. Local organisers have designated the game as a Pride Match because it falls on the Friday before Pride Weekend, which celebrates diversity and the LGBTQ+ community.

title: Arsenal explore moves for Newcastle's Guimaraes & Tonali
excerpt: Arsenal have held exploratory talks over potential moves for Newcastle pair Bruno Guimaraes and Sandro Tonali.
summary: Newcastle United signed Bruno Guimaraes from Lyon in 2022 and Sandro Tonali from AC Milan in 2023 Arsenal have held exploratory talks over potential moves for Newcastle pair Bruno Guimaraes and Sandro Tonali. The Gunners want to add a new central midfielder to their squad this summer and are assessing numerous options, with Guimaraes and Tonali among the players the club have actively explored.

title: Urgency, magic and Rashford: how England can beat the low block against Panama | Emma Hayes
excerpt:
Thomas Tuchel’s team will be working on key details of how to combat a low block before their final Group L game on Saturday

England’s goalless draw with Ghana reminded me of many games in my coaching career, when you’re facing a team who are extremely compact, positioned very low, and very
summary: Thomas Tuchel’s team will be working on key details of how to combat a low block before their final Group L game on Saturday England’s goalless draw with Ghana reminded me of many games in my coaching career, when you’re facing a team who are extremely compact, positioned very low, and very well drilled. To break them down you need to play with more variety, better movement and – above all – urgency, and it took England too long to play with urgency. They can expect the same stubborn defending from Panama on Saturday. Therefore, in the buildup to their final group match, they will have been working on the key details needed to score against a low block.

title: How content creators are bringing fans an added dimension to this World Cup
excerpt:
YouTubers reveal how they are challenging traditional broadcast coverage of the tournament with their own audience interaction

For decades, the World Cup belonged to broadcasters. Fans gathered around the television, watched the game live or caught the highlights later that evening. In the
summary: YouTubers reveal how they are challenging traditional broadcast coverage of the tournament with their own audience interaction For decades, the World Cup belonged to broadcasters. Fans gathered around the television, watched the game live or caught the highlights later that evening. In the UK, BBC and ITV acted as gatekeepers, deciding which stories were told and how audiences experienced football’s biggest tournament. That world still exists. Millions watch live matches on television, and broadcasters remain dominant when it comes to rights and access. But alongside them, another layer of football media has emerged.

title: Elliot Anderson’s journey from Bristol Rovers loanee to most expensive British player
excerpt:
England midfielder’s remarkable rise started off in League Two with his £116m move to Manchester City confirmation of his relentless progress

At Bristol Rovers the players would fight over being on Elliot Anderson’s team in training five-a-sides because they knew they would be victorious. E
summary: England midfielder’s remarkable rise started off in League Two and his £116m move to Manchester City is confirmation of his relentless progress At Bristol Rovers the players would fight to be on Elliot Anderson’s team in training five-a-sides because they knew they would be victorious. Even as a teenager, the midfielder was a cut above his more experienced peers, becoming an integral part of the club’s promotion to League One, the first step on his journey to becoming the most expensive British player after Manchester City agreed to pay £116m for his services. The Rovers loan was not the start of a rapid rise for Anderson, who returned to his boyhood club, Newcastle, to find the squad stacked with talented midfielders and struggled to cement a place. In the end, his main contribution at St James’ Park was helping the club avoid financial penalties, his homegrown status helping when he left for Nottingham Forest in 2024 in a deal that in effect valued him at £15m. It is at the City Ground where he has established himself as one of the country’s best midfielders, causing pain to Geordies.

title: Football Daily | Animal instinct and maths boost Netherlands’ hopes of World Cup glory
excerpt:
Sign up now! Sign up now! Sign up now? Sign up now!

When Paul the Octopus sadly died at
summary: Sign up now! Sign up now! Sign up now? Sign up now! When Paul the Octopus sadly died at an aquarium in Germany in 2010, there was a massive void to fill in the World Cup prediction space. It seemed a huge ask to find a tipster on the same level as the eight-legged maverick one-off. Others tried but Leon the Porcupine, Anton the Tamarin and Petty the Pygmy Hippopotamus were all woefully wide of the mark; this was no golden generation of animal oracles. Things turned dark in 2018 when a new octopus, Rabio, appeared on the scene but was killed by a Japanese fisher despite the sea-dwelling savant getting it right with all three of the Samurai Blue’s group games. The best of the rival bunch at World Cup 2010 was Mani the Parakeet. The Singapore-based budgie produced a clean sweep of winning tips in the quarters but then blew it in the final by selecting the Netherlands to beat Paul’s pick, Spain. There was only one winner. Predicting the Dutch to lift the World Cup has been an exercise in frustration after their defeats in the finals of 1974, 1978 and 2010. But could that all be about to change in 2026?

title: Usyk vacates world titles
excerpt: Oleksandr Usyk has vacated his WBC, WBA, IBF and Ring Magazine world heavyweight titles - but revealed he has not retired.
summary: Oleksandr Usyk announces he will vacate his world heavyweight titles before stepping into boxing ring for final time; he vacates WBA, WBC and IBF heavyweight titles to bring an end to his dominance of the sport although the 39-year-old insists he has not retired Please use Chrome browser for a more accessible video player Oleksandr Usyk has vacated his WBC, WBA, IBF and Ring Magazine world heavyweight titles - but revealed he has not retired.

title: Antonelli completes Austria Friday double as Russell struggles
excerpt: World championship leader Kimi Antonelli completed a Friday practice double at the Austrian Grand Prix with a dominant showing in the second session at the Red Bull Ring.
summary: Kimi Antonelli tops both Friday practice sessions at Red Bull Ring; George Russell only sixth in other Mercedes; Oscar Piastri second ahead of McLaren team-mate Lando Norris; watch final practice on Saturday at 11.30am with Qualifying from 3pm, live on Sky Sports F1 World championship leader Kimi Antonelli completed a Friday practice double at the Austrian Grand Prix with a dominant showing in the second session at the Red Bull Ring. Having edged his Mercedes team-mate George Russell by just four hundredths of a second in the opening session, Antonelli separated himself from the field later in the day with a time of 1:07.014s.
